hook.summary: A person holds real playing cards, expressing hope for a Royal Straight Flush.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of hands fanning out playing cards in a card shop setting.

scene_flow: Live-action footage of someone fanning out playing cards, hoping for a Royal Straight Flush.
Transition to a streamer reacting excitedly to a mobile poker game interface.
Fast-paced motion graphics montage featuring poker suits, chips, and energetic text.
Gameplay footage showing a massive win and the 'Hangame Poker' logo.
audience_proxy: Korean adult males who enjoy the thrill of poker and social casino gaming.
